name: otterbridge-server
description: OtterBridge - Node/TypeScript MCP server bridging browser actions to the Otter Chrome extension. Supports stdio (desktop MCP hosts / .mcpb) and streamable HTTP (CLI agents / MCP Inspector).
author: wen-da-ng (OtterBridge)

scripts.pack: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('../LICENSE','LICENSE')" && npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack . otterbridge.mcpb
scripts.pretest: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test: node test/http.mjs && node test/stdio.mjs && node test/env.mjs && node test/security.mjs && node test/multitab.mjs && node test/parallel.mjs
